main.description: Mint a short-lived space credential for a member of `spaceUri`. The caller is identified by their service-auth JWT; the credential's `sub` is set to that DID, scoped 'rw'. Use the returned credential as the `X-Space-Credential` header on subsequent requests instead of minting a fresh service-auth JWT each time. Refresh via `refreshCredential` before expiry.

credential.description: Compact JWS (ES256) signed by the authority's key. Header `kid` references the verification method on the authority's DID document.

errors.name: NotImplemented
errors.description: Authority is not configured to sign credentials.
